news.headline: Wave Life Sciences' trial WVE-006 shows successful therapeutic RNA editing in humans for Alpha-1 Antitrypsin Deficiency, potentially lowering risks.
news.summary: Wave has successfully demonstrated proof-of-concept for their RNA editing technology. This has resulted in the restoration of wild-type M-AAT levels within the body. These levels are comparable to individuals with the heterozygous "MZ" genotype, which is associated with a low risk of AATD lung and liver disease. This achievement marks a significant advancement in the field, with promising implications for potential treatments.

news.headline: Global peritoneal dialysis market to reach $12.70 billion by 2029, with 5.8% CAGR. Elderly population drives demand for home treatment, leading to increased adoption. Peritoneal dialysis solution bags hold largest market share due to daily use for patients. Continuous ambulatory peritoneal dialysis dominates market due to cost-effectiveness. Download full report: https://www.marketsandmarkets.com/pdfdownloadNew.asp?id=211750966
news.summary: The global peritoneal dialysis market is projected to increase from USD 9.58 billion in 2024 to USD 12.70 billion by 2029, reflecting a 5.8% CAGR. The surge in demand is tied to the growing elderly population, prone to chronic kidney disease due to aging-related renal changes, diabetes, and hypertension. Peritoneal dialysis (PD) is preferred by the elderly as it can be done at home, enhancing quality of life and lowering hospital admissions. PD also offers benefits like improved patient satisfaction and preserving kidney function compared to Hemodialysis. The setup cost for PD may be higher, limiting its widespread adoption over in-center Hemodialysis. The market is segmented based on offerings such as peritoneal dialysis machines, solution bags, catheters, etc. PD solution bags dominate the market due to their consumable nature, low cost, and high demand for daily dialysis. Peritoneal dialysis modalities include continuous ambulatory PD (CAPD) and automated PD, with CAPD holding a larger market share due to its cost-effectiveness, minimal technical requirements, and reduced healthcare facility overhead costs. Autmated PD machines are gaining popularity, especially in developed regions, fueling market growth.

news.headline: IgGenix starts Phase 1 trial "ACCELERATE Peanut" with IGNX001 for peanut allergy. Topline data in mid-2025.
news.summary: A cutting-edge discovery platform called SEQ SIFTER™ has been utilized to redesign human IgE antibodies into IgG antibodies, with the aim of preventing binding and offering defense against peanut allergens. Anticipated results are set to be announced by the middle of 2025. news.headline: Floridians prefer climate-conscious candidates, 52% more likely to vote for them: FAU survey.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by FAU revealed that the majority of residents in Florida prefer candidates who prioritize addressing climate change. This data underscores the importance of climate change as a deciding factor in political elections for Floridians. The survey, conducted in October 2024 in Boca Raton, Florida, highlights the significance of environmental policies and actions in shaping public opinion and electoral outcomes in the state.
